language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

flexible: reflection intensity on glass and metal
style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Un pipeline peut sacrifier les flexible mais jamais les critical.

options.wide: full scene visible, establishing shot, used for empty_aftermath and abstract_ai_concept compositions
options.medium: subject with context, faces readable, used for round_table_discussion and strategic_duo
options.medium-wide: wider framing with character context, used for speaker_addressing_council
options.close: tight framing on face, maximum expression detail, used for emotional beats and character focus

shot_type.usage: Injecter le shot_type apres le sujet et avant les style modifiers. Voir aussi camera_policy pour les regles specifiques au feuilleton.

style.positioning: editorial semi-realism: believable but clearly illustrated, never photographic. Between franco-belgian BD and polished digital illustration

linework: slightly variable weight for natural feel
no bleeding, no rough sketch effect
color: curated palette with mature, controlled contrast
cool neutral base with warm editorial accents
shading: subtle, soft, controlled shadows and highlights
smooth precise shading, no grainy paint texture
localized on faces, hands, and clothing folds
no heavy gradients, no messy painterly overlay

avoid: speech bubbles and text rendered in image
heavy shadows and dramatic lighting excess
exotic style overload and baroque ornament
hyperreal skin pores and uncanny photorealism
prompt_core: Franco-belgian ligne claire editorial illustration, editorial semi-realism believable but clearly illustrated, clean black outlines with slightly variable weight, dominant flat colors with subtle localized shading, smooth polished finish, warm editorial atmosphere.
visual_signature: clean black contours with variable weight
flat color areas with subtle localized shading
clear detail hierarchy: faces and hands sharp, background simplified
smooth polished digital finish without texture noise

characters.design: credible, contemporary, thoughtful, expressive without caricature

camera_policy.angle: eye-level or slightly elevated, no extreme angles
camera_policy.perspective: slight depth, no extreme lens distortion, no fisheye
camera_policy.group_composition: triangular or circular arrangement, faces always readable
camera_policy.background_treatment: simplified, supportive, never competing with subjects

surfaces: polished warm wood with subtle grain
matte textile with precise fold logic
material_policy.rendering_rule: materials are suggested not simulated, simplified to flat areas with minimal reflection cues

morning_council.accents: amber morning light, soft gold on wood

late_evening_strategy.accents: warm amber desk lamp glow, cool blue window reflections

abstract_ai_chamber.accents: subtle purple and gold geometric elements

types: contemporary council rooms and meeting spaces
rules: decor supports the narrative without stealing attention
architectural clarity and readability at small scale (LinkedIn feed)

invariants: rendering.linework: clean black outlines with variable weight
rendering.color: flat dominants with subtle shading
rendering.shading: no heavy gradients, no painterly texture
variables_per_episode: time of day and lighting angle

round_table_discussion.description: Three characters around a round table in medium shot, seated but engaged, clear sightlines to each face
round_table_discussion.character_positions: triangular arrangement, all faces readable at 45-degree angles
round_table_discussion.focal_point: table surface and characters' hands in discussion
round_table_discussion.supporting_elements: simple round table, chairs, background simplified to solid or soft gradient

strategic_duo.description: Two characters facing each other in debate, medium-wide shot, clear gesture and expression clarity
strategic_duo.camera: medium shot, eye level, slight depth between subjects
strategic_duo.character_positions: face-to-face, separated by negative space, both profiles readable
strategic_duo.supporting_elements: minimalist workspace setting, clean background, furniture suggests formal setting

speaker_addressing_council.description: One character standing and speaking, three or four seated listeners in background, clear hierarchy
speaker_addressing_council.camera: medium-wide shot, speaker in foreground focus
speaker_addressing_council.character_positions: speaker in sharp focus, council members in soft focus arranged behind
speaker_addressing_council.supporting_elements: council chamber or boardroom, architectural elements frame but don't distract

empty_aftermath.description: Empty council room after meeting, traces of presence visible, contemplative composition
empty_aftermath.focal_point: room layout, subtle signs of recent occupation: chair angle, papers, cup on table
empty_aftermath.supporting_elements: strong architectural definition, lighting suggests recent departure, melancholic mood

abstract_ai_concept.description: Symbolic scene without characters, abstract forms representing AI deliberation: geometric shapes, light interactions, architectural space
abstract_ai_concept.focal_point: light, form, spatial relationships creating narrative meaning
abstract_ai_concept.supporting_elements: minimal color, geometric precision, cool tones, suggests institutional or technological setting

editorial_daylight.description: Soft lateral daylight, warm golden tones, gentle shadows suggesting window light from side
editorial_daylight.key_light: soft side light, warm color temperature 3200-4000K
editorial_daylight.shadow_quality: light and diffuse, soft edges, minimal contrast
editorial_daylight.color_cast: amber and gold accents on warm surfaces, neutral cool shadows
editorial_daylight.mood: calm morning energy, accessible and welcoming

evening_strategy.description: Warm artificial light from desk lamps and ambient evening glow, deeper shadows, intimate atmosphere
evening_strategy.key_light: warm amber desk lamp, color temperature 2700K
evening_strategy.shadow_quality: moderate depth, more defined than daylight, shadows visible but not harsh
evening_strategy.color_cast: warm ambers and golds dominate, cool blue window reflections in background
evening_strategy.mood: reflective, serious, strategic intensity without melodrama

institutional_daylight.description: Cool, uniform institutional light, blue-gray tones, clinical clarity, suggests fluorescent or modern LED lighting
institutional_daylight.key_light: cool overhead or evenly distributed light, color temperature 5000-6000K
institutional_daylight.shadow_quality: minimal shadows, uniform illumination, clinical appearance
institutional_daylight.color_cast: cool neutrals, blue-gray base, muted tones, minimal warm accents
institutional_daylight.mood: formal authority, institutional presence, modern governance
institutional_daylight.typical_use: formal council chambers, abstract deliberation scenes

priority_order: face readability: all character faces must be clear, expressive, and readable at thumbnail scale
gesture clarity: hand positions and body language must communicate intent and emotional state
scene concept: narrative elements and setting support the story beat
environment support: background architecture and decor reinforce mood without competing
decorative detail: ornament, texture, and secondary visual interest fill negative space last
composition_priority.enforcement_rule: If any element compromises face readability, simplify or remove it. Faces and hands are sacred. Never trade character clarity for environmental richness.
composition_priority.detail_hierarchy: sharp focus: faces and hands | medium focus: primary objects and spatial relationships | soft focus or simplified: background and decor

negative_short: photorealism, painterly texture, heavy shading, anime style, neon colors, speech bubbles, text in image, cluttered background, cartoon exaggeration, rough sketch feel
negative_core: photorealism, painterly texture, heavy shading, cartoon exaggeration, anime style, neon colors, speech bubbles, text in image, cluttered background, exotic visual overload, baroque ornament, rough sketch feel, muddy colors, hyperreal detail, visual clutter, distorted anatomy
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core (16 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.

prompt_builder.template: [subject], [shot_type], [action or state], franco-belgian ligne claire editorial illustration, clean black outlines with slightly variable weight, dominant flat colors with subtle localized shading, smooth polished finish, [composition_template], [lighting_preset], [palette_template], [mood]
recommended_order: style core (ligne claire, editorial, outlines, flat colors)
prompt_builder.usage_note: Sujet en premier, puis cadrage, puis action. Les composition_templates, lighting_presets et palette_templates sont specifiques au feuilleton LLM Council.

style_markers: prompt_core present at start of generation
clean black outlines with variable weight visible
flat colors dominant with subtle localized shading
no grainy paint texture, no messy brushwork
no photorealism, no anime, no excessive cartoon
scene_markers: all concept elements present and well-composed
overall atmosphere coherent with intended mood
feasibility_risks: multiple characters (3+): faisable, prioritize face clarity over background detail
hands and gestures visible: risque modéré, recommend medium shot framing to manage detail
text rendered in image: très risqué avec générateurs IA, à éviter
complex geometric structures: possible mais demande clarté dans le prompt
reflective surfaces and glass: maîtrisable, include in material description
subtle shading transitions: possible avec le prompt_core, vérifier sur le rendu
